description: Gateay Django metrics dashboard using django-prometheus metrics exporter

panels.description: Average number of database executions triggered by each incoming HTTP request
panels.title: DB Queries per HTTP Request
Number of Requests by Processing Time

targets.expr: topk(20, (1 - (sum(max_over_time(django_http_requests_latency_seconds_by_view_method_bucket{kube_deployment_name=~"^$application$",le="$threshold"}[$__range]) / ignoring(le) max_over_time(django_http_requests_latency_seconds_by_view_method_count{kube_deployment_name=~"^$application$"}[$__range])) by (method, view) / count(present_over_time(django_http_requests_latency_seconds_by_view_method_count{kube_deployment_name=~"^$application$"}[$__range])) by (method, view))) > 0.0099 and on(view)(django_http_requests_latency_seconds_by_view_method_count{view=~"v1:.*"}))

panels.description: Rate of database statements executed per second, by database alias.
panels.title: DB Query Rate by alias
DB Query Duration Percentiles (p50 / p95 / p99)

title: Gateway
